'''Oolak Goyl''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who had something of an obsession for collecting anything and everything, no matter what the cost. He had little interest in school as a child, and left to pursue a career of collection at an early age. After building up a small fortune in funds, Oolak hired several professional treasure thieves to do his work for him, most notably [[Aach Een]].

Oolak was always accompanied by a pair of hired [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards, and would spend most of his free time learning everything possible about his collection. Though [[Obsessive-compulsive disorder|obsessive-compulsive]] and slightly insane, he was very thorough in his planning, and was never careless, rash or free with money. He owned a [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Luxury 3000 space yacht]], the ''[[One in a Million]]''.
